Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey... Have you talked to Mochizuki-kun at all?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Oh, okay. I was just wondering what sort of person he is.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}He seems really, um... affectionate? Is that normal overseas?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1107 0 0}Oh yeah? You think maybe you could get along with him?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}He seems really, um... affectionate? Is that normal overseas?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14001 0 0}Why, hello, Takeba-san... Oh, and good morning to you, too, {f 4 2}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}You see, since I transferred here at such an awkward time, I was hoping I could get to know everyone better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}It must suck having to transfer schools so often.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14010 0 0}Can't deny that. I should be used to it by now, but it's always hard to leave new friends. Gets a little lonely, you know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 221 1 25 25}So, how about keeping me company for a little while? Wanna grab a quick bite sometime?[n]{f 1 1}
